title: A New World
author: Brennan Hatton
variants:
Ahhh, a new world! A freshie!
Goodbye old world!
We dont need you!

That old world was holding us back!
Not anymore with this big beautiful new world!

Look at it! With all it newness, new blocks and new possaiblitie!
This is... different. A whole new world!

New world, new train... wait... is that the same train?

It cant be!
The train can cross worlds?

An inter dimentional train!?

I guess that would be a train that travels from overworld to the neather and end, but this ... is different

It travels beyond dimensions!
 New.. Realities..

Well, this is what you get for breaking the rules. A whole new world!

You really did it this time didn't you?
Had to abadond that other world.

Was it worth it?

Are you finally happy?

Look at this place!
Its all new and different.

New blocks,
new mobs,
new train!

Is it a new train...?

Or are we just so far along the same train we entered a new world?

New world, new life!

Finally, you can be the version of you, you were meant to be!

Without the old world dragging you down!
